title: pilosella fennica subsp. melanauricula
intro: Pilosella fennica subsp. melanauricula is a rare, endemic subspecies of the Pilosella genus, commonly known as the Alpine Mouse-ear or Black-leaved Mouse-ear, characterized by its dark leaves and short stems. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella fennica subsp. melanauricula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral properties, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine. Herbal preparations of Pilosella fennica subsp. melanauricula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
